templates.name: STM32 MCU Base Spec
templates.description: Common STM32/GD32 MCU firmware spec set: AI Claude/Codex collaboration rules, Git/SVN dual-track version control, and company C coding standard. Defaults to IAR Embedded Workbench (company mainstream, ~90%); STM32CubeIDE+GCC notes included for the few legacy projects.

templates.name: MCU Project Bootstrap
templates.description: One-shot interactive skill that finishes the project-root configuration after `trellis init -t mcu-stm32-base` — appends AGENTS.md, writes .gitignore, creates doc/, injects version macros into define.h, sets svn:ignore, optionally binds git remote. Idempotent. Use after a fresh trellis init in a new MCU firmware project.
